h1: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Oliver Dowden, the Member of Parliament for Hertsmere.
headings: h2: Supporting the Diverse Local Community
h3: The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere
text_excerpt: Campaigns | The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Skip to main content The Rt Hon Sir Oliver Dowden KCB CBE MP Member of Parliament for Hertsmere Main navigation Home About Oliver News Campaigns About Hertsmere Contact Surgeries Campaigns Defending our Countryside One of the great pleasures of living in our part of Hertfordshire is the countryside we have right on our doorstep. I grew up enjoying our green areas and love... Better Public Transport I have campaigned tirelessly as Hertsmere’s MP to secure vital upgrades to our local transport services. We massively rely on these transport links, both to get... Supporting the Diverse Local Community One of our great strengths in Hertsmere is the diversity of our community locally, and one of the great joys of being Hertsmere’s MP has been making a huge... Improving Education Our local state schools provided me with an excellent education. I will never forget the debt of gratitude that I owe to Parmiters’ School in Watford. The great education I got there enabled me to do so much with my life, whether it was winning a place at Cambridge University, working for the Prime Minister or having the privilege of being elected as a Member of Parliament. Vibrant Local Economy Hertsmere has a vibrant and growing local economy, which I am determined to support wherever I can. We are a world-leading location for film and TV production... Strong Infrastructure As our towns and villages continue to grow, particularly with a new Local Plan being developed, we must get the infrastructure to go with it. During discussions...
